## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, and `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] New logic has tests (helpers in `src/lib.ts` or new modules)
- [ ] README updated if command behavior or flags changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under "Unreleased"
- [ ] No pro/commercial source, license keys, or registry secrets included
